_comment: Optional personal-profile override for the LLM scorer.
Copy this file to 'profile.local.json' (which is gitignored) and edit it,
OR paste its contents into the OH_PROFILE_JSON secret for the cloud run.
Every field is optional — anything you omit keeps its built-in default
(see DEFAULT_PROFILE in user_profile.py). Numeric weights are 0-10
(geo is 1-5). On your own machine the loader ALSO reads your real Nova
profile from ~/.taskflow/user_profile.json, so you may not need this at all.
name: Mohith
long_term_goal: Become an exceptional AI engineer, builder, and entrepreneur before graduation.
values: Portfolio and resume value matter far more than cash prizes or swag.
